productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Green Check Black Ties
description: With a checkered black and grey design in broad and narrow checks and has hints of fluorescent green, this tie from indigo nation is a perfect match for a variety of dress shirts - from classic white to black and grey. Length: 153 cm Made of 100% handmade microfibre for durability and easy use Has broad and narrow grey and black checks with fluorescent green accents One loop with brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care only dry clean
